name: Ubiquiti UniFi Cloud Gateway Fiber
title: Ubiquiti UniFi Cloud Gateway Fiber
title_extended: Ubiquiti UniFi Cloud Gateway Fiber – High-Performance Fiber Gateway & Router
short_description: Dual WAN ports (10G SFP+ and 10 GbE RJ45), LAN: 10G SFP+, 4-port switch (4x 2.5 GbE RJ45 with one PoE+), 10G throughput, Quad-core ARM Cortex-A73 at 2.2 GHz, 3 GB RAM, IDS/IPS, RouterOS L4
description: Powerful 10G performance with dual WAN ports, advanced security features including stateful firewall and IPS/IDS, robust hardware with quad-core CPU and 3GB RAM, license-free SD-WAN, and versatile VPN support.

detailed_description.heading: Powerful 10G Performance
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Cloud Gateway Fiber (UCG-Fiber) is engineered to deliver exceptional networking performance, catering to the demands of modern enterprises. It features dual WAN ports—one 10G SFP+ and one 10 GbE RJ45—providing versatile connectivity options for high-speed internet access. On the LAN side, the device offers one 10G SFP+ port and an integrated 4-port switch with four 2.5 GbE RJ45 ports, including one PoE+ port. This configuration ensures seamless integration into existing network infrastructures and supports high-bandwidth applications, making it ideal for businesses requiring robust and scalable networking solutions. The UCG-Fiber offers extensive VPN and SD-WAN functionalities to meet the connectivity needs of distributed networks. It supports license-free SD-WAN, facilitating efficient and cost-effective site-to-site connectivity.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Security Features
detailed_description.text: Security is a paramount consideration in the UCG-Fiber's design. It incorporates a stateful firewall and an application-aware Layer 7 firewall, enabling granular control over network traffic. The device also supports deep packet inspection (DPI) and traffic identification, allowing for detailed monitoring and management of data flows. With intrusion prevention and detection systems (IPS/IDS) boasting over 55,000 signatures powered by CyberSecure, the UCG-Fiber provides robust protection against potential threats, ensuring the integrity and security of your network. The device is compatible with various VPN protocols, including IPsec, OpenVPN, WireGuard, and L2TP, providing flexible options for secure remote access. The Teleport zero-configuration VPN feature simplifies the setup process, enabling quick and secure connections between remote users and the central network.

detailed_description.heading: Robust Hardware Specifications
detailed_description.text: The UCG-Fiber is designed to deliver exceptional performance, ensuring smooth operation even in demanding enterprise environments. Powered by a quad-core ARM® Cortex®-A73 processor running at 2.2 GHz and supported by 3 GB of system memory, the device can efficiently handle high data throughput, complex routing, and security tasks. With a maximum power consumption of 29.4W (excluding PoE output), the UCG-Fiber maintains energy efficiency while delivering high-speed networking capabilities. It includes a 54V DC/1.1A power adapter for reliable power delivery. For management and configuration, the device supports both Ethernet and Bluetooth, providing administrators with flexible access options. The compact desktop form factor ensures easy deployment, whether in a home office or enterprise environment.

comments.name: Carlo
comments.text: The gateway is top, software interfaace terrific, very well thought in the port you need to start at a  very reasonable price. So from this perspective it's a full 5. The problem borns when you want to extend the networ with switches... many options all with issue: one model does not have power supply embedded end very expensive to buy external, many value model do not support link aggregation options, so in the end to have a one performing box you need to spend a lot ... on a switch, way more than the value you got in the gateway ... Happy but not cheap.

comments.name: Mohammed
comments.text: The level of control and protection in this small form-factor router is just amazing in terms of how much it costs.. definitely highly recommended

comments.name: Søren
comments.text: Super nice little router with lots of opportunities in the control panel.

comments.name: Avi
comments.text: As close as it gets to a perfect high speed internet router/firewall. The device is very powerful, it can route close to 10Gbps even with PPPOE due to hardware offloading. Even with IPS/IDS enabled the throughput is in the range of 5Gbps. Connectivity wise it is also very good with single 10G RJ45 port, two SFP+ ports and additional 2.5Gbps where one of them provides POE+. The user interface is very polished and easy to use. Bottom line: great.
